---
title: "Final Analysis"
author: "Line Sandby"
date: "2026-04-30"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(sf)
library(terra)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
```
```{r create folders}
if (!dir.exists("../out")) dir.create("../out")
if (!dir.exists("../out/maps")) dir.create("../out/maps")
if (!dir.exists("../out/tables")) dir.create("../out/tables")
if (!dir.exists("../data")) dir.create("../data")
```
```{r loading pre-processed data}
elevation <- rast("../data/elevation_vejle_masked.tif")
bbr <- st_read("../data/bbr_vejle_clean_25832.gpkg")
study_area <- st_read("../data/study_area_vejle_land_25832.gpkg")
```

```{r transforming data}
bbr_raster_crs <- st_transform(bbr, crs(elevation))
study_area_raster_crs <- st_transform(study_area, crs(elevation))
```

```{r creating flood vulnerability zones}
risk_matrix <- matrix(
  c(
    -Inf, 1, 1,
    1, 2, 2,
    2, 3, 3,
    3, Inf, 4
  ),
  ncol = 3,
  byrow = TRUE
)

risk_zones <- classify(
  elevation,
  rcl = risk_matrix,
  right = FALSE,
  include.lowest = TRUE
)

names(risk_zones) <- "risk_zone"

writeRaster(
  risk_zones,
  "../data/flood_vulnerability_zones.tif",
  overwrite = TRUE
)
```
```{r extracting elevation of buildings}
extracted_elevation <- terra::extract(
  elevation,
  vect(bbr_raster_crs)
)

bbr_raster_crs$elevation_m <- extracted_elevation[, 2]

summary(bbr_raster_crs$elevation_m)
```
```{r assigning vulnerability categories to buildings}
risk_levels <- c(
  "Critical flood-prone: <1 m",
  "High vulnerability: 1-2 m",
  "Moderate vulnerability: 2-3 m"
)

bbr_raster_crs <- bbr_raster_crs %>%
  mutate(
    risk_category = case_when(
      is.na(elevation_m) ~ "No elevation data",
      elevation_m < 1 ~ "Critical flood-prone: <1 m",
      elevation_m >= 1 & elevation_m < 2 ~ "High vulnerability: 1-2 m",
      elevation_m >= 2 & elevation_m < 3 ~ "Moderate vulnerability: 2-3 m",
      elevation_m >= 3 ~ "Lower vulnerability: >3 m",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    in_risk_zone = risk_category %in% risk_levels
  )

bbr_raster_crs$risk_category <- factor(
  bbr_raster_crs$risk_category,
  levels = c(
    "Critical flood-prone: <1 m",
    "High vulnerability: 1-2 m",
    "Moderate vulnerability: 2-3 m",
    "Lower vulnerability: >3 m",
    "No elevation data"
  )
)

table(bbr_raster_crs$risk_category)
```
```{r creating 10 years building periods}
bbr_raster_crs <- bbr_raster_crs %>%
  mutate(
    period_10yr = cut(
      byggeaar,
      breaks = c(seq(1925, 2015, by = 10), 2026),
      right = FALSE,
      include.lowest = TRUE,
      labels = c(
        "1925-1934",
        "1935-1944",
        "1945-1954",
        "1955-1964",
        "1965-1974",
        "1975-1984",
        "1985-1994",
        "1995-2004",
        "2005-2014",
        "2015-2025"
      )
    )
  )

table(bbr_raster_crs$period_10yr)
```

```{r percentage by vulnerability category and period}

percentage_summary <- bbr_raster_crs %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  filter(!is.na(period_10yr)) %>%
  mutate(
    vulnerability_group = case_when(
      risk_category == "Critical flood-prone: <1 m" ~ "Critical flood-prone: <1 m",
      risk_category == "High vulnerability: 1-2 m" ~ "High vulnerability: 1-2 m",
      risk_category == "Moderate vulnerability: 2-3 m" ~ "Moderate vulnerability: 2-3 m",
      risk_category == "Lower vulnerability: >3 m" ~ "Remaining area",
      TRUE ~ "No elevation data"
    )
  ) %>%
  count(period_10yr, vulnerability_group, name = "n_buildings") %>%
  group_by(period_10yr) %>%
  mutate(
    total_buildings_period = sum(n_buildings),
    percentage = round((n_buildings / total_buildings_period) * 100, 2)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

percentage_summary

write.csv(
  percentage_summary,
  "../out/tables/percentage_by_vulnerability_category.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)
```

```{r plotting percentage by vulnerability category}

ggplot(
  percentage_summary %>%
    filter(vulnerability_group %in% c(
      "Critical flood-prone: <1 m",
      "High vulnerability: 1-2 m",
      "Moderate vulnerability: 2-3 m"
    )),
  aes(
    x = period_10yr,
    y = percentage,
    fill = vulnerability_group
  )
) +
  geom_col(position = "stack") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Critical flood-prone: <1 m" = "darkred",
      "High vulnerability: 1-2 m" = "orange",
      "Moderate vulnerability: 2-3 m" = "yellow"
    )
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Percentage of buildings constructed in flood vulnerable zones",
    subtitle = "Percentages are calculated from all buildings in each 10-year period",
    x = "Construction period",
    y = "Percentage of all buildings",
    fill = "Vulnerability category"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggsave(
  "../out/tables/percentage_buildings_in_risk_zones_by_category.png",
  width = 10,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)
```

```{r table of vulnerable zones}
flood_vulnerable_table <- percentage_summary %>%
  filter(vulnerability_group %in% c(
    "Critical flood-prone: <1 m",
    "High vulnerability: 1-2 m",
    "Moderate vulnerability: 2-3 m"
  )) %>%
  group_by(period_10yr) %>%
  summarise(
    n_buildings = sum(n_buildings),
    total_buildings_period = first(total_buildings_period),
    percentage = round(sum(n_buildings) / first(total_buildings_period) * 100, 2),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```


```{r table of percentage of vulnerable zones}
flood_vulnerable_percentages <- flood_vulnerable_table %>%
  select(
    period_10yr,
    n_buildings,
    total_buildings_period,
    percentage
  ) %>%
  rename(
    `Construction period` = period_10yr,
    `Buildings in flood vulnerable zones` = n_buildings,
    `Total buildings in period` = total_buildings_period,
    `Percentage in flood vulnerable zones` = percentage
  )

flood_vulnerable_percentages

write.csv(
  flood_vulnerable_percentages,
  "../out/tables/flood_vulnerable_percentages_only.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

```
```{r converting risk raster to polygon}
risk_polygons <- as.polygons(
  risk_zones,
  dissolve = TRUE,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

risk_polygons_sf <- st_as_sf(risk_polygons)

risk_polygons_sf <- risk_polygons_sf %>%
  mutate(
    risk_label = case_when(
      risk_zone == 1 ~ "Critical flood-prone: <1 m",
      risk_zone == 2 ~ "High vulnerability: 1-2 m",
      risk_zone == 3 ~ "Moderate vulnerability: 2-3 m",
      risk_zone == 4 ~ "Lower vulnerability: >3 m"
    )
  )

risk_polygons_sf$risk_label <- factor(
  risk_polygons_sf$risk_label,
  levels = c(
    "Critical flood-prone: <1 m",
    "High vulnerability: 1-2 m",
    "Moderate vulnerability: 2-3 m",
    "Lower vulnerability: >3 m"
  )
)

risk_polygons_vulnerable_sf <- risk_polygons_sf %>%
  filter(risk_label %in% risk_levels)
```

```{r mapping buldings by 10 year periods with risk zones}
ggplot() +
  geom_sf(
    data = study_area_raster_crs,
    fill = NA,
    color = "grey70",
    linewidth = 0.2
  ) +
  geom_sf(
    data = risk_polygons_vulnerable_sf,
    aes(fill = risk_label),
    color = NA,
    alpha = 1
  ) +
  geom_sf(
    data = bbr_raster_crs %>% filter(!is.na(period_10yr)),
    color = "black",
    shape = 16,
    size = 0.05,
    alpha = 0.6
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ period_10yr, ncol = 4) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Critical flood-prone: <1 m" = "darkred",
      "High vulnerability: 1-2 m" = "orange",
      "Moderate vulnerability: 2-3 m" = "gold"
    )
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(
    title = "Buildings by 10-year construction period",
    subtitle = "Black points show buildings constructed in each period. Vulnerable zones are shown as transparent overlays.",
    fill = "Flood vulnerability zone"
  )

ggsave(
  "../out/maps/buildings_by_10yr_period_with_risk_zones.png",
  width = 20,
  height = 14,
  dpi = 600
)

ggsave(
  "../out/maps/buildings_by_10yr_period_with_risk_zones.pdf",
  width = 20,
  height = 14,
  device = "pdf",
  bg = "white"
)

```
```{r creating 50 year comparison}
bbr_50yr <- bbr_raster_crs %>%
  filter(!is.na(byggeaar)) %>%
  filter(byggeaar >= 1925, byggeaar <= 2025) %>%
  mutate(
    period_50yr = case_when(
      byggeaar >= 1925 & byggeaar <= 1974 ~ "1925-1974",
      byggeaar >= 1975 & byggeaar <= 2025 ~ "1975-2025"
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(period_50yr))

period_comparison <- bbr_50yr %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  group_by(period_50yr) %>%
  summarise(
    total_buildings = n(),
    risk_buildings = sum(in_risk_zone, na.rm = TRUE),
    risk_share = round(risk_buildings / total_buildings * 100, 2),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

period_comparison

write.csv(
  period_comparison,
  "../out/tables/risk_share_50_year_comparison.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)
```
```{r hexagon map of full study area}
periods <- tibble(
  period_50yr = c("1925-1974", "1975-2025")
)

bbr_hotspot <- bbr_50yr %>%
  st_transform(25832)

study_area_hotspot <- study_area_raster_crs %>%
  st_transform(25832) %>%
  st_make_valid()

hex_grid <- st_make_grid(
  study_area_hotspot,
  cellsize = 700,
  square = FALSE
) %>%
  st_as_sf() %>%
  mutate(hex_id = row_number()) %>%
  st_filter(study_area_hotspot)

buildings_hex <- st_join(
  bbr_hotspot,
  hex_grid["hex_id"],
  join = st_intersects
)

hex_summary <- buildings_hex %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  filter(!is.na(hex_id)) %>%
  group_by(hex_id, period_50yr) %>%
  summarise(
    total_buildings = n(),
    risk_buildings = sum(in_risk_zone, na.rm = TRUE),
    risk_share = risk_buildings / total_buildings * 100,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

hex_all_periods <- hex_grid %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  select(hex_id) %>%
  tidyr::crossing(periods)

hex_hotspot_data <- hex_all_periods %>%
  left_join(hex_summary, by = c("hex_id", "period_50yr")) %>%
  mutate(
    map_category = case_when(
      is.na(total_buildings) ~ "No building data",
      risk_share == 0 ~ "0%",
      risk_share > 0 ~ "More than 0%"
    )
  )

hex_hotspot <- hex_grid %>%
  left_join(hex_hotspot_data, by = "hex_id")

ggplot(hex_hotspot) +
  geom_sf(
    aes(fill = risk_share),
    color = "grey80",
    linewidth = 0.05
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ period_50yr) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(
    option = "magma",
    limits = c(0, 100),
    na.value = "grey90",
    name = "% in risk zone"
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(
    title = "Share of buildings constructed in flood risk zones",
    subtitle = "Grey hexagons have no building data for the period"
  )

ggsave(
  "../out/maps/hex_hotspot_full_study_area.png",
  width = 12,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 300
)

write.csv(
  hex_hotspot_data,
  "../out/tables/hex_hotspot_risk_share.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)
```
